channel.title: My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Project

item.description:
title: “whoami” date: 2026-05-12 type: “page”

» INITIALIZING RESUME…

» LOADING PROFESSIONAL_SUMMARY…

Strategic and hands-on Engineering Leader with a proven track record of building and leading global DevSecOps teams of 20+ engineers. Expert in designing and managing globally distributed systems handling 1B+ calls per month using AWS, GCP, & Alibaba Cloud.

[0] CORE_COMPETENCIES

  • Leadership: Strategic Roadmap Development, Global Team Engineering (20+), Platform Engineering (DX), AI Strategy & Adoption, Cloud FinOps.
  • Cloud & Infrastructure: AWS, GCP, Aliyun (Alibaba Cloud), Multi-Cloud Resilience, On-Prem to Cloud Migration.
  • Tools & Automation: Terraform, Terragrunt, Ansible, GitLabs, Jenkins, Fastlane (Mobile CI/CD).
  • Security & Compliance: SOC2 Compliance, DevSecOps Culture, Identity Management (IAM), AquaSec, Lacework, Mend.
  • Operations: SRE Maturity, SLAs/SLOs, 24/7/365 On-call Management, Database Administration.

[1] EXPERIENCE

Director - Head of DevOps & SRE | Tyfone, Inc. (2023 – Present)

  • Technical & Strategic Leadership: Oversee platform infrastructure, tooling, and developer experience for a global organization.
  • Cloud Migration: Led 100% migration from On-Prem to AWS with secure-by-default architecture.
  • AI Integration: Directing AI adoption to streamline workflows and improve engineering efficiency.

Director - DevOps Platform | Panzura (2022 – 2023)

  • Philosophy: Orchestrated “Everything as Code” transformation for the DevSecOps platform.
  • Infrastructure: Designed secured IaC using GitLab, Terraform, and Terragrunt for automated CI/CD.
  • Compliance: Managed a full security stack (AquaSec, Lacework, Mend) to maintain SOC2 standards.

Manager - API & IAM | Align Technology (2017 – 2022)

  • Scale: Managed Global API & Identity Platform supporting high-concurrency microservices and 1B+ monthly calls.
  • Migration: Led 100% migration to multi-cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Aliyun).
  • Team: Grew and managed a global team of 10+ engineers; maintained 24/7/365 rotations.
  • Mobile: Designed CI/CD for mobile apps (Google Play/Apple Store) using Fastlane.

Senior DevOps Engineer | Verizon (2016 – 2017)

  • Led “Lift & Shift” migrations to AWS using Jenkins and Ansible.

ProdOps/DevOps Engineer / Systems Engineer II | Progress Software (2012 – 2016)

  • Managed physical R&D datacenters, VMWare, and complex database environments.

Sushi Chef | Japanese Restaurants (2009 – 2011)

  • Managed high-volume service and precision-based food preparation. Be a cool Sushi Chef.

[2] EDUCATION

  • M.S. in Information Technology | Virginia Tech
  • B.S. in Computer Science (Minor in Business) | NC State University
  • A.S. in Engineering | Wake Tech CC

[3] CONTACT_INFO

  • Location: Raleigh-Durham, NC
  • Phone: 919-274-7257
  • Email: danhuynh.info@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: /in/danhconghuynh
